generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor mounted on the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudMessage
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera for capturing RGB-D images."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraImageMessage
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor generating speed data for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedMessage
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor reporting the vehicle steering state."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleMessage
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance CameraImageMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering applied to LiDAR point clouds to identify clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman-filter tracking of object states from detected clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Accelerator control logic per ISO 15622 for adaptive cruise control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of sensor data and tracks."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization meshes for vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C4: Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringEnabler, DatabaseEnabler
]

instance CameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Camera RGB-D image data transmitted in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraImageMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, DatabaseEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed information transmitted in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler, DatabaseEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle information transmitted in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler, DatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks derived from LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrackingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler, DatabaseEnabler
]

instance DesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed command computed by ACC logic."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedMessage
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects raw LiDAR point clouds, camera images, and vehicle state data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables DBSCAN clustering of LiDAR point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ClusteringService
]

instance TrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables Kalman-filter tracking of detected object states."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrackingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables ACC algorithm execution on the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables persistent storage of data using SQL."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables 3D visualization of vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MotorControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Translates desired speed into motor voltage commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote management of ACC, desired speed and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance ClusteringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into detected clusters from LiDAR data."
]

instance TrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into tracked object trajectories."
]

instance DesiredSpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on computed desired cruise speed."
]

instance RealTimeStateDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state and tracks."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle, tracks and environment."
]

instance ReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human‑readable report of object tracks and vehicle performance."
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data stored in the SQL database."
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable the adaptive cruise control feature."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable the adaptive cruise control feature."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set a new desired speed command for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking in the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorVoltageCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send motor voltage command derived from desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring of vehicle state and tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStateDisplayInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compute desired speed on the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedComputationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC, desired speed and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generate human‑readable reports of tracks and performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportingInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Store sensor and computed data in SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Send motor voltage commands to vehicle actuators."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorVoltageCommandAction
]

instance ClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Clustering service performing DBSCAN on LiDAR point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ClusteringInsight
]

instance TrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Tracking service performing Kalman filter on detected object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrackingInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT—such as desired speed, enable/disable ACC, emergency braking, and steering commands—sent over ROS 2 to the Actuation Functional Entity, which writes motor voltage and steering servo commands to the vehicle’s speed controller and steering actuator."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real‑time with an end‑to‑end latency of ≤100 ms from vehicle to DT and clock synchronization within 100 ms, enabling ACC computations at each perception cycle (typically on the order of 10 Hz)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247‑inspired architecture comprising a Physical Twin Entity (responsible for data pre‑processing and actuation), a Digital Twin Entity (Data Collection, Data Storage, ACC Controlling, Reporting), a User Entity (3D visualization and control panel interfaces), and a Cross‑System Data Translation Entity connecting them; all entities are implemented as ROS 2 packages, orchestrated through ROS 2 topic and service exchanges over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The system passes through design (specification of DT services and requirements), development (mapping ISO 23247 architecture, implementing ROS 2 nodes), verification & validation (performance tests, latency measurements), and operation (live monitoring and remote control during vehicle runs). The DT represents the vehicle in operation, while the physical twin corresponds to the manufactured vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensured by maintaining <100 ms end‑to‑end latency, clock sync within 100 ms, using verified clustering (DBSCAN) and tracking (Kalman filter) algorithms, and implementing ACC according to ISO 15622; validation is performed through unit tests, latency benchmarking, and offline replay of vehicle state data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication is handled by ROS 2 over DDS (e.g., FastDDS or OpenSplice) on a Wi‑Fi network; inter‑entity messages include ROS 2 topics for LiDAR point clouds, vehicle state, and control commands, while cross‑system translation uses a dedicated Data Translation Functional Entity that serializes and performs unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed across heterogeneous compute nodes: the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano hosts the Physical Twin Entity, a remote edge server or cloud instance hosts the Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), and a user workstation runs the User Entity; all nodes run a Linux distribution and ROS 2."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT, ISO 15622 for ACC control logic, ROS 2 open standard for middleware, NVIDIA JetPack SDK, and open‑source repositories ensuring compliance with existing automotive safety standards."
]
